query: SELECT s.id, s.runId, s.slideIndex, s.headline, s.videoUrl, s.assembledUrl, s.isVideoSlide, s.videoPrompt, r.status as run_status FROM generated_slides s JOIN content_runs r ON r.id = s.runId WHERE s.runId IN (360001, 360002, 360003) ORDER BY s.runId, s.slideIndex;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3BMt98Y6933b8wn.a26cf65c5d5d --database gydcH5xscZ9R6SrGgu5bZS --execute SELECT s.id, s.runId, s.slideIndex, s.headline, s.videoUrl, s.assembledUrl, s.isVideoSlide, s.videoPrompt, r.status as run_status FROM generated_slides s JOIN content_runs r ON r.id = s.runId WHERE s.runId IN (360001, 360002, 360003) ORDER BY s.runId, s.slideIndex;

rows.headline: AI WARS: OPENAI VS ANTHROPIC, AND THE RESUME DILEMMA
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A futuristic, glass-walled corporate battleground with two distinct, glowing energy fields (one green, one orange) clashing in the center, surrounded by abstract data streams. CAMERA: Slow, dramatic push-in from a wide shot to a medium shot, slightly orbiting the clashing energies. SUBJECT: The two energy fields pulsating and sparking as they collide, with digital debris (abstract, non-readable code fragments) scattering outwards. LIGHTING: High-contrast, dynamic lighting with intense green and orange glows from the energy fields, casting deep, moving shadows. MOOD: Intense, competitive, high-stakes, futuristic.

rows.headline: OPENAI AND ANTHROPIC ENLIST CONSULTANTS IN ENTERPRISE AI SHOWDOWN
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, futuristic data center with towering server racks stretching into the distance, illuminated by pulsating light. CAMERA: Medium shot, slightly low angle, focusing on the central conflict. SUBJECT: Two distinct, glowing energy spheres – one vibrant green (OpenAI's color) and one warm orange (Anthropic's color) – are locked in a silent, powerful struggle, emitting sparks and data streams as they push against each other. LIGHTING: Dramatic, high-contrast lighting with the green and orange glows dominating the scene, creating deep shadows and reflections on the metallic surfaces. MOOD: Intense, competitive, high-stakes, technological rivalry.

rows.headline: IS YOUR RESUME AI-PROOF? EXPERTS WEIGH IN
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A stark, minimalist office corridor leading to a glowing, translucent digital barrier that shifts with abstract patterns. CAMERA: Close-up, eye-level shot, focusing on a pair of human hands (diverse skin tone) holding a paper resume, hesitating just before the digital barrier. SUBJECT: The human hands and the edge of a resume, with the glowing, abstract digital barrier in the foreground, subtly distorting the background. LIGHTING: Cool, sterile overhead lighting contrasting with the warm, inviting glow of the barrier, creating a sense of anticipation and slight apprehension. MOOD: Anxious, critical, modern, slightly dystopian.

rows.headline: ARS TECHNICA FIRES REPORTER FOR AI-FABRICATED QUOTES
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A dimly lit, vintage newsroom desk with an old-fashioned typewriter and scattered papers, but with a crack running through the desk and a glowing, distorted digital image projected onto one of the papers. CAMERA: Medium close-up, slightly Dutch angle, focusing on the fractured desk and the distorted projection. SUBJECT: A single, glowing, abstract digital image (representing AI-generated falsehoods) shattering a traditional news article, with fragmented words (unreadable) scattering. LIGHTING: Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, with a single, harsh spotlight on the fractured desk and the glowing digital distortion, casting long, unsettling shadows. MOOD: Somber, broken trust, ethical dilemma, digital corruption.

rows.headline: AI-GENERATED 'SLOP' FLOODS SOCIAL MEDIA, USERS REACT
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, abstract digital landscape resembling a social media feed, filled with an endless, chaotic stream of low-resolution, glitchy, and rapidly changing abstract digital content. CAMERA: Dolly zoom effect, slowly pulling back while simultaneously zooming in, creating a disorienting sensation as the 'slop' floods the frame. SUBJECT: A torrent of abstract, pixelated, and rapidly morphing digital 'junk' flowing like a river, occasionally forming distorted, fleeting shapes that immediately dissolve. LIGHTING: Overcast, dull digital lighting with occasional flashes of garish, conflicting colors from the 'slop', creating a sense of visual noise and overwhelming saturation. MOOD: Chaotic, overwhelming, frustrating, dystopian, sensory overload.

rows.headline: OPENAI'S PENTAGON DEAL SHAKES UP AI — AND YOUR JOB IS NEXT
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, desolate digital landscape under a stormy, pixelated sky, with faint, glowing green data streams flowing into a dark abyss. CAMERA: Medium shot, 50mm lens, slightly low angle. SUBJECT: A stylized, abstract representation of a crumbling digital fortress in the distance, partially obscured by digital dust. LIGHTING: Harsh, dramatic backlighting from a central, ominous green light source, casting long shadows. MOOD: Somber, tense, suggesting decline and uncertainty.

rows.headline: IS YOUR RESUME AI-READY? HERE'S HOW TO TELL
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A sleek, minimalist office desk at twilight, bathed in the soft glow of a monitor. CAMERA: Close-up, 35mm lens, eye-level. SUBJECT: A pristine white resume document, with glowing blue lines of text being digitally scanned and analyzed by an unseen AI, represented by subtle, pulsing blue light emanating from the document itself. LIGHTING: Soft, ambient blue and white light from the screen, creating gentle reflections on the desk surface. MOOD: Analytical, precise, slightly futuristic, emphasizing scrutiny and efficiency.

rows.headline: APPLE TURNS TO GOOGLE TO POWER NEXT-GEN SIRI
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, ethereal digital realm where two colossal, stylized cloud formations meet. CAMERA: Wide shot, 24mm lens, slightly high angle. SUBJECT: One cloud is a shimmering silver-white, representing Apple's aesthetic, while the other is a vibrant, multi-colored swirl (red, blue, yellow, green), representing Google's. They are gently merging at their edges, with subtle energy arcs flowing between them. LIGHTING: Soft, celestial glow from within the clouds, creating a sense of powerful convergence. MOOD: Majestic, collaborative, hinting at a significant partnership.

rows.headline: OPENAI LOSES 1.5 MILLION USERS AFTER PENTAGON DEAL BACKLASH
rows.videoPrompt: CAMERA: Slow push-in, 5-second arc. ACTION: A vast, glowing green digital city, representing OpenAI/ChatGPT, begins to crack and crumble. Thousands of small, glowing white user avatars (abstract, non-human shapes) are seen rapidly dissolving and streaming away from the city's core, like a digital exodus. The cracks in the city glow with an ominous red light. LIGHTING: The city is initially bright green, but as users leave, shadows deepen and red light pulses from the cracks. MOOD: Urgent, dramatic, depicting mass departure and consequence.

rows.headline: META INKS $150M AI CONTENT DEAL WITH NEWS CORP
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A high-tech, futuristic data center with glowing servers and intricate fiber optic cables. CAMERA: Medium close-up, 85mm lens, slightly low angle. SUBJECT: A large, translucent blue holographic interface displaying abstract, flowing data streams and financial graphs, with a prominent, stylized digital 'handshake' icon at its center. A subtle, glowing red-orange energy pulse emanates from the interface, suggesting content exchange. LIGHTING: Dominant cool blue and purple neon lights from the data center, with a warm, subtle orange glow from the interface. MOOD: Sophisticated, high-stakes, depicting a significant digital transaction.

rows.headline: APPLE ASKS GOOGLE TO POWER SIRI: WHAT IT MEANS FOR YOU
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, futuristic cityscape at twilight, with towering, glass-and-steel skyscrapers reflecting the last light of day. CAMERA: Wide shot, slightly low angle, capturing the scale of the city. SUBJECT: In the foreground, a single, stylized, glowing digital 'brain' or 'network core' pulsates with energy, connected by luminous data streams to various buildings. One stream is visibly thicker and brighter, snaking upwards towards a prominent, slightly higher building, while another stream branches off and thins out towards the lower levels of the city. LIGHTING: Dramatic chiaroscuro, with deep blues and purples from the twilight sky contrasting with sharp, electric greens and golds from the AI network. MOOD: Awe-inspiring, slightly ominous, hinting at interconnectedness, power, and the complex flow of digital influence.

rows.headline: AI CODING TOOLS' PRICES SKYROCKET—DEVELOPERS FEEL THE PINCH
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A dark, minimalist developer's workstation, with multiple monitors displaying abstract code patterns in a glowing green hue. CAMERA: Close-up, slightly Dutch angle, focusing on a pair of hands. SUBJECT: A pair of human hands, slightly worn, hovering over a sleek, illuminated keyboard. One hand is clenching slightly, as if in frustration or contemplation, near a digital display showing a rising cost graph. LIGHTING: Predominantly backlit by the green screen glow, casting deep shadows on the hands and keyboard, with a subtle, cold blue ambient light from the room. MOOD: Tense, frustrated, focused, reflecting the 'pinch' of rising costs.

rows.headline: APPLE TURNS TO GOOGLE TO POWER NEXT-GEN SIRI
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A vast, ethereal digital void, filled with shimmering data streams. CAMERA: Slow push-in, then an orbit around the merging entities. SUBJECT: Two distinct, glowing, abstract energy spheres – one a sleek, polished silver (representing Apple) and the other a vibrant, multi-colored swirl (representing Google) – slowly drift towards each other. As they meet, they begin to intertwine and merge, with tendrils of light exchanging between them, forming a new, hybrid, pulsating entity. The merging process is fluid and dynamic. LIGHTING: Bright, internal luminescence from the spheres, illuminating the surrounding digital void with soft gradients of silver, blue, green, yellow, and red. MOOD: Collaborative, transformative, futuristic, with a sense of powerful integration.

rows.headline: DALLAS FED: AI HITS ENTRY-LEVEL JOBS, BOOSTS VETERAN PAY
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A split-level, stylized office environment, with a clear division between a lower, more crowded, slightly dim area and an upper, spacious, brightly lit area. CAMERA: Medium wide shot, slightly elevated, capturing both levels. SUBJECT: On the lower level, a group of younger, less defined figures are partially obscured by digital fog, their forms dissolving slightly as if fading. On the upper level, a few distinct, confident figures (their faces obscured or from behind) stand clearly, bathed in light, interacting with glowing, advanced interfaces. A subtle, glowing digital barrier or current flows between the levels. LIGHTING: The lower level is lit with cool, desaturated blues and grays, while the upper level glows with warm, confident golden and amber tones. MOOD: Stark contrast, poignant, reflective of economic disparity and technological shift.

rows.headline: QUILLIAM: YOUR NEW AI CHIEF OF STAFF
rows.videoPrompt: SETTING: A sleek, modern home office at dawn, with soft, diffused light entering through a large window. CAMERA: Dolly zoom, starting wide on the office and slowly zooming into the interface. SUBJECT: A person's hand reaches out and activates a minimalist, glowing interface on a desk. As the interface comes to life, abstract, ethereal digital elements (representing various AI tools) begin to orbit and coalesce around a central, glowing 'Quilliam' icon. The elements then seamlessly flow and connect, demonstrating coordination and efficiency. The entire sequence is smooth and responsive. LIGHTING: Soft, natural morning light from the window, augmented by the internal, bright, and responsive glow of the digital interface and orbiting elements, predominantly in cool blues and purples. MOOD: Efficient, intelligent, empowering, showcasing seamless integration and advanced assistance.
